cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.description: We use Google Analytics to understand how users find the best prices. No personal data is stored.

crowdsource.title: Report Prices
crowdsource.welcome: Help the community by reporting real-time fuel prices from your local station!
crowdsource.placeholder: Crowdsourcing features are coming soon. Stay tuned!

notifications.title: 🔔 Alerts
notifications.enabled_desc: You'll be notified when prices drop significantly
notifications.denied_desc: Enable in browser settings to get price alerts
notifications.prompt_desc: Get a notification when fuel price drops below a threshold

alert.high_gap: Large price difference in your area! Check the list for savings.
alert.quota_exceeded: Firebase read limit reached for today. Try again tomorrow!
alert.quota_exceeded_desc: We are fetching prices from cache if possible, but new updates cannot be loaded right now.

analysis.recommendation: Historically, {{day}}s are the cheapest days to refuel.

loading.funny_1: If this crashes, the free tier is gone... 🍞
loading.funny_2: Houston, we have a problem... free limit at 99%. 🚀
loading.funny_3: One does not simply fetch prices without hitting the limit. 🏔️
loading.funny_4: Help me, Firebase Admin... you're my only hope (to stay free). 💫
loading.funny_5: I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse... 50,000 free reads. 🤌
loading.funny_6: I feel the need... the need for free quota! 🏎️
loading.funny_7: Mama always said Firebase was like a box of chocolates... you never know when it's gonna run out. 🍬
loading.funny_8: You can't handle the truth! (And our daily limit can't either). ⚖️
loading.funny_9: I've seen things you people wouldn't believe... like our usage bill. 🌌
loading.funny_10: Are you not entertained?! Is this not why our quota is gone?! ⚔️
loading.funny_11: Great Scott! The user count is over 1.21 gigawatts! 🏎️💨
loading.funny_12: Frankly, my dear, I don't give a... wait, we hit the read limit?! 😱

rich_list.title: 💸 Rich List
rich_list.desc: The "Avoid at all costs" List (Top 5 Most Expensive)
